raw_description:
Le Méridien Al Khobar is a luxurious 5-star hotel featuring fitness facilities and an outdoor swimming pool. Free on-site parking and free in-room Wi-Fi are available.

All guestrooms at Le Méridien feature comfortable armchairs and elegant, soft-coloured design. Along with a minibar and a personal safety deposit box, guests can make use of a specially designed work desk with additional lighting.

Hotel Le Méridien Al Khobar features squash and tennis courts. Guests are also welcome to use the hotel's sauna and relax with a massage.

Le Méridien Hotel is situated in the heart of Al Khobar, 3 km away from Gold Souk (Gold Market) and the Half Moon Bay. It is 40 km away from Bahrain Airport and less than 50 km away from King Fahd Airport.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.5for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Le Meridien Al Khobar. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
